top_signals.title: ECB reports on progress towards euro adoption
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Senate joins House in voting to halt Iran war
top_signals.summary: It marks the first time both chambers approved directing a president to remove armed forces from hostilities since the War Powers Act was adopted in 1973.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.summary: Federal Reserve Board issues enforcement action with former employee of Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Sports-based prediction markets app Onyx Odds raises $20 million in round led by Kraken parent Payward
top_signals.summary: The app will face stiff competition in the prediction markets space, competing with dominant market leaders Kalshi and Polymarket.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
